name: coherence-mcp-server
description: MCP server for the Coherence Network — 20 typed tools for AI agents to browse ideas, trace value chains, link identities, and record contributions.

tools.name: list_ideas
tools.description: Browse ideas sorted by free energy score

tools.name: get_idea
tools.description: Get idea details including tasks and progress

tools.name: get_coherence_score
tools.description: Get coherence score with signal breakdown

tools.name: ask_question
tools.description: Ask a question on an idea

tools.name: stake
tools.description: Invest CC in an idea (triggers compute tasks)

tools.name: record_contribution
tools.description: Record a contribution to the network

tools.name: link_identity
tools.description: Link an external identity to a contributor
